short_description: Mooring line parted during night berthing operation in strong winds.
pattern_summary: Fatigue and equipment failure during night berthing in adverse weather.

short_description: Vessel grounded on shoal water approaching harbour entrance.
pattern_summary: Navigation error in shoal water due to chart datum misunderstanding.

short_description: Crew member slipped on wet deck during cargo operations.
pattern_summary: Slip on wet deck surface during cargo operations without adequate PPE.
